subcodes.first_line: O My handmaiden! Bear thou witness unto that whereunto God Himself hath testified before the creation of all things: that there is none other God but Him, and He Who hath appeared [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امتی ان اشهدی بما شهد الله قبل خلق الاشیاء انه لا اله الا هو و الذی ظهر
subcodes.subjects: @station of the Manifestation of God, @praise and encouragement, @transcendence; unknowability of God
